description: Repeated blocks that differ only by index or stride should be tested as authored loops before landing generated-looking source.

preferred_shape:
value = ctx->entries[index].field_14;
/* Keep uncertain fields conservatively named until stronger evidence exists. */
description: Raw byte math hides recoverable typed field or array access and should not be treated as final source.

preferred_shape:
lbl_804D1234.field_00 = value;
/* Rename directly only after evidence supports a semantic name. */
description: Define aliases hide guessed names and make one symbol appear to have multiple accepted names.
A same-translation-unit extern can hide the body from the compiler and steer code generation.
